concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Empirical reproduction-number estimation and outbreak monitoring
concept_decisions.labels_compared: renewal_reproduction_number_models vs reproduction_number_methods_theory vs reproduction_number_control_planning_models vs reproduction_number_reviews_meta_analyses
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifested concept row plus all 150 manifested assignment titles and complete abstracts.
concept_decisions.rationale: The manifest label is materially over-broad: the slice mixes empirical R/Rt estimation papers, formal methods/theory papers, intervention-planning models, and review/meta-analytic syntheses. The largest coherent retained subset is empirical outbreak-specific estimation and monitoring.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Intervention and control planning models using reproduction numbers
reassignments.rationale: Primary design uses mechanistic or scenario modeling to evaluate control, vaccination, treatment, testing, or planning.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Empirical reproduction-number estimation and outbreak monitoring
reassignments.rationale: Primary design estimates or monitors R/Rt from outbreak, surveillance, contact-tracing, or genomic data.

new_concepts.rationale: Formal work on definitions, inference algorithms, statistical estimation procedures, threshold theory, numerical approximation, and computational tooling for R0/Rt.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Intervention and control planning models using reproduction numbers
new_concepts.rationale: Mechanistic or scenario models that use R0/Rt to evaluate vaccination, treatment, isolation, testing, masking, lockdown, or eradication strategy choices.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Reviews, meta-analyses, and comparative syntheses of reproduction numbers
new_concepts.rationale: Evidence-synthesis papers whose primary design is systematic review, meta-analysis, pooled comparison, or narrative synthesis of reproduction-number estimates or estimation methods.
